name: Patient Case
history: Worked overseas and built a website related to that work. Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and later abandoning projects when difficulties arise. Family-related difficulty involving his father; wrote a personal letter as part of a forgiveness process.
intermediate_belief: If I encounter difficulties, it means I am not capable.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never succeed in my projects.
coping_strategies: Avoids completing projects by abandoning them when challenges occur.
situation: Working on a personal project involving the development of a website.
auto_thought: I won't be able to finish this project.
behavior: Procrastinates and eventually abandons the project.
